seoTitle: Pomona Unified Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Pomona Unified 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 28 last day, school holidays, no school days, Thanksgiving, Winter Break, Spring Break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Pomona Unified lists 180 student days and 188 days of service for 2026-2027. The first day of school is August 12, 2026 and is a shortened day for all students. Professional development student-free days are listed August 6, August 7, August 10, September 15, November 2, and January 19. Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027. Spring Break runs March 29 through April 2, 2027. Elementary school parent conferences run October 15-23, 2026 and March 11-19, 2027. The last day of school is May 28, 2027 and is listed as a shortened day for all students with no late start.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pomona Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Pomona Unified starts the 2026-2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026. The calendar lists this as a shortened day for all students.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pomona Unified Winter Break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pomona Unified Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pomona Unified in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027. The calendar lists it as a shortened day for all students with no late start.

calendarFaqs.q: Is Pomona Unified closed during Thanksgiving week?
calendarFaqs.a: Pomona Unified lists schools not in session from November 23-25, 2026, followed by Thanksgiving holidays on November 26-27, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Pomona Unified have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 calendar lists shortened days for all students on the first and last days of school, shortened days for elementary students, and shortened days for high school students.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days are students in school at Pomona Unified?
calendarFaqs.a: Pomona Unified lists 180 student days for the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Pomona Unified calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official Pomona Unified 2026-2027 calendar PDF link on this page for the source calendar. MySchoolDates also provides an importable ICS calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

customSections.label: Family Planning Guide for Pomona Unified 2026-2027
customSections.content: Beyond major holidays, families should pay attention to student-free days, shortened schedules, and conference periods that may affect childcare, transportation, and pickup routines. Winter Break and Spring Break are the main vacation-planning windows, while professional development days, shortened days, and elementary parent conference periods may require shorter-term childcare coverage.

rows: Longer school breaks are the safest windows for family travel planning.
Students do not attend even when staff report, so families may need coverage.
Dismissal and after-school coverage may change by grade level or campus.
Both dates affect semester closeout and shortened-day planning.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified No School Days 2026-2027
customSections.content: Pomona Unified no-school days include district holidays, student-free professional development days, teacher work days, and the major break periods shown in the calendar. Families should distinguish full student-free dates from shortened days because shortened days still include student attendance but may require different pickup, transportation, or after-school arrangements.

rows: August 6, August 7, August 10, September 15, November 2, January 19
Students do not attend; staff schedules may still be active.
Labor Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving, MLK Day, Memorial Day
Useful for family schedule and childcare planning.
Thanksgiving week, Winter Break, Spring Break
Longer no-school periods for travel and childcare coverage.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified Shortened Days and Early Dismissal
customSections.content: The Pomona Unified calendar lists multiple shortened-day patterns, including shortened days for all students, elementary students, and high school students. Families should verify dismissal times with the assigned school because shortened-day schedules can vary by grade level, campus, and conference or exam window.

rows: Affects districtwide pickup and after-school routines.
Elementary dismissal timing may differ from normal school days.
Listed monthly and near semester close
High school families should check class and final-exam schedules.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified District Profile
customSections.content: This profile summarizes the district entity and calendar scope for the 2026-2027 Pomona Unified calendar page. It is intended to clarify that this page covers the districtwide traditional academic calendar, while individual campuses may publish additional operational dates.

customSections.label: What's Changed From 2025-2026
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 Pomona Unified calendar keeps the same first student day and 180-day instructional count while moving several year-end and break dates one day earlier than the prior school year.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified Calendar Review Information
customSections.content: This page was last reviewed on July 22, 2026 against the official Pomona Unified 2026-2027 calendar source. MySchoolDates checked the first day, last day, student-free professional development days, teacher work days, shortened days, winter break, spring break, elementary conference periods, grading-period dates, downloadable files, and official source links.

customSections.label: How This Pomona Unified Calendar Was Prepared
customSections.content: This Pomona Unified calendar page is prepared from the district's published school calendar documents. MySchoolDates extracts and reviews first and last student days, holidays and break periods, student-free days, shortened days, conference windows, grading-period dates, and downloadable calendar files. Calendar records are maintained by the MySchoolDates Calendar Data Team, and dates are checked against the official district source before publication.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified Calendar Data Coverage
customSections.content: This data coverage summary explains what is included in the Pomona Unified calendar record and what families should still verify with the district or individual schools.

rows: Checked against the reviewed district calendar source.
Includes Thanksgiving week, Winter Break, Spring Break, and district holidays listed in the school-year calendar.
Includes professional development student-free days, teacher work days, and shortened-day patterns shown in the calendar.
Elementary conference windows and grading-period markers are summarized when available in the source.
Athletics, graduation, testing, individual bell schedules, and school-only events should be confirmed with each campus.
